# docs(agentos): de-stale KnowledgeBase.md + the "Gemini embeddings" claims (incl. README toolchain line)

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** `KnowledgeBase.md` + the README "Toolchain" section claim "ChromaDB + Gemini embeddings"; reality is local-or-remote providers + unified Chroma.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] `KnowledgeBase.md` describes provider-agnostic embeddings (local default / remote option) + unified Chroma + current ingestion.
- [ ] README "Toolchain (Agent OS)" embedding bullet corrected (local-or-remote, not "Gemini embeddings").

**Files:** `learn/agentos/KnowledgeBase.md`, `README.md` (toolchain bullet).
